version_description: This version contains tabs and chords for the whole song, including the main riff and solo. Playing acoustically, I think it sounds great transposed down two, with the Capo on 2nd Fret.
tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: I Want You To Want Me

content:
N.C.
I hear a wind
Whistling air
Whispering in my ear

[tab][Main Riff]
  [ch]E[/ch]                           [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]B5[/ch]
e|--------------------------|--------------------------|
B|---5---3-3---5--5---3-----|---5---3-3---5--5---3-----|
G|-----4-----4------4---4---|-----4-----4------4---4---|
D|-2----------------------5-|-2----------------------5-|
A|--------------------------|--------------------------|
E|--------------------------|--------------------------|[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]D/C#[/ch]     [ch]B5[/ch]
Boy mercury shooting through every degree[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D/C#[/ch]  [ch]B5[/ch]
Oh girl dancing down those dirty and dusty trails[/tab]

[tab]        [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D/C#[/ch] [ch]B5[/ch]
